candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets, not target.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash-like line, but less standard than the explicit cash and cash equivalents total.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but balance sheet label is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the start of the period
candidates.why: Beginning cash from cash flow statement, not preferred for balance-sheet CHE.
Not cash and cash equivalents.
Not the standard reported balance-sheet cash total.
Transaction cash flow, not cash balance.
Financing inflow, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities under IFRS-style wording; better than balancing items.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current balancing line, not target.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for short-term debt/current borrowings excluding non-debt payables; likely the main reported current debt total.
Can represent short-term financing debt, but may or may not already be included in current interest-bearing liabilities.
Would be a valid current portion of long-term debt line, but appears blank in preview.
Lease-related current debt; excluded from baseline STD.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected the cleanest reported current debt line. Manual review recommended because 'Bank overdraft (credit facilities)' may be an additional short-term debt component in some years, and inclusion overlap is unclear from the preview.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best reported balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment on a net basis; preferred over gross and accumulated depreciation components.
Gross PPE total, but net/total reported PPE is preferred when available.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component, not the PPE total.
Adjustment line, not the reported PPE balance.
Lease-related subset of PPE, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr PPE under Capital Lease
candidates.why: Contra-asset lease component, not PPE total.
Cash flow statement expense, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the reported net tangible assets line as PPE proxy, preferred over gross components.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported operating cash flow line.
